SEARCH
Package com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity

Class Entity

java.lang.Object
com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener
Direct Known Subclasses:
DumbEntity
public abstract class Entity extends Object implements org.bukkit.event.Listener
Abstract base class for generic custom entities.

Provides common properties and methods for all custom entities, such as ID, name, type, and drop management.

Handles spawning, targeting, and death events, allowing subclasses to define specific behaviors and drops.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected Map<org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack,ChanceMinMaxPair>
    amountedDrops
    Map for drops with variable amounts, where each ItemStack has an associated chance and min/max amount.
    protected Map<Map<org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack,ChanceMinMaxPair>,Float>
    amountedSelectiveDrops
    Map for drop groups with variable amounts, where each group has a set chance to drop and each ItemStack has an associated min/max amount, and within the group each ItemStack has its own amount and drop weight within the set.
    protected Map<org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack,ChanceAmountPair>
    customDrops
    Map for basic custom drops, where each ItemStack has an associated chance and fixed amount.
    protected boolean
    dropsInitialized
    Flag to ensure that drops are only initialized once.
    protected final org.bukkit.entity.EntityType
    entityType
    The Bukkit EntityType that this custom entity will spawn as.
    protected final String
    id
    Unique identifier for this entity type, used for persistence and identification.
    protected final net.kyori.adventure.text.Component
    name
    The custom name to display for this entity, or null for no custom name.
    protected final org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin
    plugin
    The plugin instance for registering events and accessing server resources.
    protected Map<Map<org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack,ChanceAmountPair>,Float>
    selectiveDrops
    Map for drop groups, where each group has a set chance to drop, and within the group each ItemStack has its own amount and drop weight within the set.
    protected int
    xpDrops
    The amount of experience to drop when this entity dies.

    Sets the target for this entity to attack or interact with.

  • Field Details

    • plugin

      protected final org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin
      The plugin instance for registering events and accessing server resources.

    • id

      protected final String id
      Unique identifier for this entity type, used for persistence and identification.

    • name

      protected final net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name
      The custom name to display for this entity, or null for no custom name.

    • entityType

      protected final org.bukkit.entity.EntityType entityType
      The Bukkit EntityType that this custom entity will spawn as. Determines the base behavior and appearance of the entity.

    • customDrops

      protected Map<org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack,ChanceAmountPair> customDrops
      Map for basic custom drops, where each ItemStack has an associated chance and fixed amount.

    • amountedDrops

      protected Map<org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack,ChanceMinMaxPair> amountedDrops
      Map for drops with variable amounts, where each ItemStack has an associated chance and min/max amount.

    • selectiveDrops

      protected Map<Map<org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack,ChanceAmountPair>,Float> selectiveDrops
      Map for drop groups, where each group has a set chance to drop, and within the group each ItemStack has its own amount and drop weight within the set.

    • amountedSelectiveDrops

      protected Map<Map<org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack,ChanceMinMaxPair>,Float> amountedSelectiveDrops
      Map for drop groups with variable amounts, where each group has a set chance to drop and each ItemStack has an associated min/max amount, and within the group each ItemStack has its own amount and drop weight within the set.

    • xpDrops

      protected int xpDrops
      The amount of experience to drop when this entity dies. Can be set to 0 for no XP drops.

    • dropsInitialized

      protected boolean dropsInitialized
      Flag to ensure that drops are only initialized once. Subclasses should check this flag in their initDrops method to avoid reinitializing drops on multiple deaths.

  • Constructor Details

    • Entity

      public Entity(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, String id, org.bukkit.entity.EntityType entityType)
      Creates a new Entity instance with the given plugin, ID, and entity type. Name is set to null by default.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this entity
      id - A unique string identifier for this entity type
      entityType - The Bukkit EntityType that this entity will spawn as

    • Entity

      public Entity(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, String id, org.bukkit.entity.EntityType entityType, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name)
      Creates a new Entity instance with the given plugin, ID, and entity type.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this entity
      id - A unique string identifier for this entity type
      entityType - The Bukkit EntityType that this entity will spawn as
      name - The custom name to display for this entity, Null by default for no custom name

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Gets the unique identifier for this entity type, used for persistence and identification.
      Returns:
      The unique ID string for this entity type

    • getEntityName

      public String getEntityName()
      Gets the display name for this entity, or null if no custom name is set.
      Returns:
      The custom name as a Component, or null if no custom name is set

    • isEntity

      public boolean isEntity(org.bukkit.entity.Entity entity)
      Checks if the given Bukkit entity is an instance of this custom entity type.
      Returns:
      True if the given entity is an instance of this custom entity type, false otherwise

    • spawn

      public org.bukkit.entity.Entity spawn(org.bukkit.Location location)
      Spawns an instance of this custom entity at the given location. The spawned entity will have the custom name and ID set.
      Parameters:
      location - The location to spawn the entity at
      Returns:
      The spawned Bukkit Entity instance

    • getTarget

      public org.bukkit.entity.Entity getTarget(org.bukkit.entity.Entity instance)
      Gets the current target of this entity, if any.
      Parameters:
      instance - The Bukkit entity instance to check for a target.
      Returns:
      The current target entity, or null if no target is set or the target cannot be found.

    • setTarget

      public void setTarget(org.bukkit.entity.Entity instance, org.bukkit.entity.Entity target)
      Sets the target for this entity to attack or interact with. This can be retrieved with getTarget.
      Parameters:
      instance - The Bukkit entity instance to set the target for
      target - The target entity to set, or null to clear the target

    • removeTarget

      public void removeTarget(org.bukkit.entity.Entity instance)
      Removes the target for this entity. This is a convenience method that calls setTarget with null.
      Parameters:
      instance - The Bukkit entity instance to remove the target for

    • newDrop

      public void newDrop(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Adds a custom drop to this entity's drop table with the specified chance and amount. This drop will be added to the entity's drops when it dies.
      Parameters:
      item - The ItemStack to add as a custom drop

    • newDrop

      public void newDrop(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, float chance)
      Adds a custom drop to this entity's drop table with the specified chance and amount. This drop will be added to the entity's drops when it dies.
      Parameters:
      item - The ItemStack to add as a custom drop
      chance - The chance for this item to drop, between 0.0 and 1.0

    • newDrop

      public void newDrop(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, float chance, int amount)
      Adds a custom drop to this entity's drop table with the specified chance and amount. This drop will be added to the entity's drops when it dies.
      Parameters:
      item - The ItemStack to add as a custom drop
      chance - The chance for this item to drop, between 0.0 and 1.0
      amount - The fixed amount of this item to drop if it drops

    • newAmountedDrop

      public void newAmountedDrop(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, int minAmount, int maxAmount)
      Adds a custom drop to this entity's drop table with the specified chance and variable amount. This drop will be added to the entity's drops when it dies.
      Parameters:
      item - The ItemStack to add as a custom drop
      minAmount - The minimum amount of this item to drop if it drops
      maxAmount - The maximum amount of this item to drop if it drops

    • newAmountedDrop

      public void newAmountedDrop(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, int minAmount, int maxAmount, float chance)
      Adds a custom drop to this entity's drop table with the specified chance and variable amount. This drop will be added to the entity's drops when it dies.
      Parameters:
      item - The ItemStack to add as a custom drop
      minAmount - The minimum amount of this item to drop if it drops
      maxAmount - The maximum amount of this item to drop if it drops
      chance - The chance for this item to drop, between 0.0 and 1.0

    • newSelectiveDrop

      public void newSelectiveDrop(List<org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack> drops, List<Float> chances)
      Adds a custom drop set to this entity's drop table with the specified chance. A random item from the drops list will be chosen to drop based on the chances list.
      Parameters:
      drops - A list of ItemStacks which will be pulled from when this drop is triggered
      chances - The chances for each item in the drops list to be chosen, relative to each other. Does not need to add up to 1, as chances will be normalized

    • newSelectiveDrop

      public void newSelectiveDrop(List<org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack> drops, List<Float> chances, List<Integer> amounts)
      Adds a custom drop set to this entity's drop table with the specified chance. A random item from the drops list will be chosen to drop based on the chances list.
      Parameters:
      drops - A list of ItemStacks which will be pulled from when this drop is triggered
      chances - The chances for each item in the drops list to be chosen, relative to each other. Does not need to add up to 1, as chances will be normalized
      amounts - The amounts for each item in the drops list to be dropped

    • newSelectiveDrop

      public void newSelectiveDrop(List<org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack> drops, List<Float> chances, List<Integer> amounts, float chance)
      Adds a custom drop set to this entity's drop table with the specified chance. A random item from the drops list will be chosen to drop based on the chances list.
      Parameters:
      drops - A list of ItemStacks which will be pulled from when this drop is triggered
      chances - The chances for each item in the drops list to be chosen, relative to each other. Does not need to add up to 1, as chances will be normalized
      amounts - The amounts for each item in the drops list to be dropped
      chance - The chance for this drop set to be triggered, between 0.0 and 1.0

    • newAmountedSelectiveDrop

      public void newAmountedSelectiveDrop(List<org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack> drops, List<Float> chances, List<Integer> minAmounts, List<Integer> maxAmounts)
      Adds a custom drop set to this entity's drop table with the specified chance and variable amount. A random item from the drops list will be chosen to drop based on the chances list.
      Parameters:
      drops - A list of ItemStacks which will be pulled from when this drop is triggered
      chances - The chances for each item in the drops list to be chosen, relative to each other. Does not need to add up to 1, as chances will be normalized
      minAmounts - The minimum amounts for each item in the drops list to be dropped
      maxAmounts - The maximum amounts for each item in the drops list to be dropped

    • newAmountedSelectiveDrop

      public void newAmountedSelectiveDrop(List<org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack> drops, List<Float> chances, List<Integer> minAmounts, List<Integer> maxAmounts, float chance)
      Adds a custom drop set to this entity's drop table with the specified chance and variable amount. A random item from the drops list will be chosen to drop based on the chances list.
      Parameters:
      drops - A list of ItemStacks which will be pulled from when this drop is triggered
      chances - The chances for each item in the drops list to be chosen, relative to each other. Does not need to add up to 1, as chances will be normalized
      minAmounts - The minimum amounts for each item in the drops list to be dropped
      maxAmounts - The maximum amounts for each item in the drops list to be dropped
      chance - The chance for this drop set to be triggered, between 0.0 and 1.0

    • initDrops

      public abstract void initDrops()
      Initializes the drops for this entity. This method should be overridden by subclasses to define their specific drops, and should check the dropsInitialized flag to avoid reinitializing drops on multiple deaths.

    • onDeath

      public void onDeath(org.bukkit.event.entity.EntityDeathEvent event)
      Handles the EntityDeathEvent for this entity, automatically applying the custom drops defined in the drop tables.
      Parameters:
      event - The EntityDeathEvent triggered when this entity dies
